mapper.select: SELECT * FROM daily_net_asset_snapshot WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND snapshot_date = #{date}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_net_asset_snapshot (user_id, snapshot_date, total_asset_cny, total_liability_cny, net_asset_cny, liquid_cny, fixed_cny, receivable_cny, investment_cny, liability_cny, note) VALUES (#{userId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{totalAssetCny}, #{totalLiabilityCny}, #{netAssetCny}, #{liquidCny}, #{fixedCny}, #{receivableCny}, #{investmentCny}, #{liabilityCny}, #{note}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_asset_cny = VALUES(total_asset_cny), total_liability_cny = VALUES(total_liability_cny), net_asset_cny = VALUES(net_asset_cny), liquid_cny = VALUES(liquid_cny), fixed_cny = VALUES(fixed_cny), receivable_cny = VALUES(receivable_cny), investment_cny = VALUES(investment_cny), liability_cny = VALUES(liability_cny), note = VALUES(note), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM daily_net_asset_snapshot WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND snapshot_date = #{date}
